source.section: Part 13 - Radio Tutorial > ARC-210 Radio Tutorial

steps.action: Left click on the COMM1 knob to pull it and select COMM1 Radio
steps.voiced: Pull the COMM1 knob to select COMM1 Radio.

steps.action: Scroll mousewheel on COMM1 Radio Channel Selector to M (Manual) Mode
steps.voiced: Set COMM1 Channel Selector to M for Manual Mode.

steps.action: Press the OSB next to AM or FM to select the desired frequency band (if we choose FM, the ":FM" symbol will appear when selected)
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to AM or FM to select your frequency band.

steps.action: Press CLR on the UFC to clear current frequency
steps.voiced: Press CLR on the UFC to clear the current frequency.

steps.action: Type "127500" on the UFC to set carrier radio frequency 127.5 MHz
steps.voiced: Type 127500 on the UFC to set frequency 127.5 MHz.

steps.action: Press ENT on the UFC to enter this frequency.
steps.voiced: Press ENT on the UFC to confirm the frequency.

steps.action: Press the COMM switch – COMM1 on your throttle to transmit.
steps.voiced: Set COMM switch to COMM1 on the throttle to transmit.
